languages.text: {n}Плавные, музыкальные интонации аристократки звучат знакомо. Именно этот голос звучал в вокс-станции мертвой сороритки, найденной вами снаружи. Наследница династии ведет двойную игру, связываясь с Инквизицией под позывным "Элана". {/n}

{n}The noblewoman's smooth, melodious voice sounds familiar. It is the same voice that you heard on the vox-station of the dead Sister of Battle you discovered outside. The von Valancius heir is playing both sides, communicating with the Inquisition under the call sign "Elana."{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Плавные, музыкальные интонации аристократки звучат знакомо. Именно этот голос звучал в вокс-станции мертвой сороритки, найденной вами снаружи. Наследница династии ведет двойную игру, связываясь с Инквизицией под позывным "Элана". {/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The noblewoman's smooth, melodious voice sounds familiar. It is the same voice that you heard on the vox-station of the dead Sister of Battle you discovered outside. The von Valancius heir is playing both sides, communicating with the Inquisition under the call sign "Elana."{/n}

{n}The noblewoman's smooth, melodious voice sounds familiar. It is the same voice that you heard on the vox-station of the dead Sister of Battle you discovered outside. The von Valancius heir is playing both sides, communicating with the Inquisition under the call sign "Elana."{/n}

{n}The noblewoman's smooth, melodious voice sounds familiar. It is the same voice that you heard on the vox-station of the dead Sister of Battle you discovered outside. The von Valancius heir is playing both sides, communicating with the Inquisition under the call sign "Elana."{/n}

languages.text: {n}La voz suave y melodiosa de la noble te resulta familiar. Es la misma voz que oíste en la estación de voco de la Hermana de Batalla muerta que encontraste fuera. La heredera von Valancius está jugando a dos bandas y se comunica con la Inquisición mediante el código «Elana».{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The noblewoman's smooth, melodious voice sounds familiar. It is the same voice that you heard on the vox-station of the dead Sister of Battle you discovered outside. The von Valancius heir is playing both sides, communicating with the Inquisition under the call sign "Elana."{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La voz suave y melodiosa de la noble te resulta familiar. Es la misma voz que oíste en la estación de voco de la Hermana de Batalla muerta que encontraste fuera. La heredera von Valancius está jugando a dos bandas y se comunica con la Inquisición mediante el código «Elana».{/n}

languages.text: {n}这位贵族女子柔美悦耳的声音听着很耳熟。你在外面发现的那位死去的战斗修女，她的音阵通讯站里传出的就是这个声音。这位冯·瓦兰修斯的继承人是个双面人，以“埃拉娜”为代号与审判庭暗中联络。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The noblewoman's smooth, melodious voice sounds familiar. It is the same voice that you heard on the vox-station of the dead Sister of Battle you discovered outside. The von Valancius heir is playing both sides, communicating with the Inquisition under the call sign "Elana."{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}这位贵族女子柔美悦耳的声音听着很耳熟。你在外面发现的那位死去的战斗修女，她的音阵通讯站里传出的就是这个声音。这位冯·瓦兰修斯的继承人是个双面人，以“埃拉娜”为代号与审判庭暗中联络。{/n}

languages.text: {n}La voix douce et mélodieuse de l'aristocrate vous est familière. C'est celle que vous avez entendue sur le poste-vox de la Sœur de Bataille dont vous avez découvert le cadavre à l'extérieur. L'héritière des von Valancius joue sur les deux tableaux, communiquant avec l'inquisition sous le nom de code « Elana ».{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The noblewoman's smooth, melodious voice sounds familiar. It is the same voice that you heard on the vox-station of the dead Sister of Battle you discovered outside. The von Valancius heir is playing both sides, communicating with the Inquisition under the call sign "Elana."{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La voix douce et mélodieuse de l'aristocrate vous est familière. C'est celle que vous avez entendue sur le poste-vox de la Sœur de Bataille dont vous avez découvert le cadavre à l'extérieur. L'héritière des von Valancius joue sur les deux tableaux, communiquant avec l'inquisition sous le nom de code « Elana ».{/n}

languages.text: {n}Soylunun pürüzsüz, melodik sesi tanıdık geliyor. Dışarıda bulduğunuz ölü Harp Rahibesi'nin voks istasyonunda duyduğun sesle aynı. Von Valancius vârisi ikili oynuyor, Engizisyon'la "Elana" çağrı işaretiyle iletişim kuruyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The noblewoman's smooth, melodious voice sounds familiar. It is the same voice that you heard on the vox-station of the dead Sister of Battle you discovered outside. The von Valancius heir is playing both sides, communicating with the Inquisition under the call sign "Elana."{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Soylunun pürüzsüz, melodik sesi tanıdık geliyor. Dışarıda bulduğunuz ölü Harp Rahibesi'nin voks istasyonunda duyduğun sesle aynı. Von Valancius vârisi ikili oynuyor, Engizisyon'la "Elana" çağrı işaretiyle iletişim kuruyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die sanfte, melodische Stimme der Adeligen kommt dir bekannt vor. Es ist dieselbe Stimme wie auf der Voxstation der toten Schwester der Schlacht, die du draußen entdeckt hast. Die Erbin derer von Valancius spielt ein doppeltes Spiel und kommuniziert mit der Inquisition mit dem Rufzeichen "Elana".{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The noblewoman's smooth, melodious voice sounds familiar. It is the same voice that you heard on the vox-station of the dead Sister of Battle you discovered outside. The von Valancius heir is playing both sides, communicating with the Inquisition under the call sign "Elana."{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Die sanfte, melodische Stimme der Adeligen kommt dir bekannt vor. Es ist dieselbe Stimme wie auf der Voxstation der toten Schwester der Schlacht, die du draußen entdeckt hast. Die Erbin derer von Valancius spielt ein doppeltes Spiel und kommuniziert mit der Inquisition mit dem Rufzeichen "Elana".{/n}

languages.text: {n}貴婦人らしい滑らかな歌声はどこかで聞いたことがある。死んだバトルシスターのボイスステーションで聞いた声と同じだ。フォン・ヴァランシウス家の相続人は両陣営と連絡を取っている。暗号名「エレーナ」でインキジションと連絡を取っている。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The noblewoman's smooth, melodious voice sounds familiar. It is the same voice that you heard on the vox-station of the dead Sister of Battle you discovered outside. The von Valancius heir is playing both sides, communicating with the Inquisition under the call sign "Elana."{/n}
